rationale: The cited paper appears in the literature review as one example in a broader stream on multihoming and two-sided media markets. The citing paper briefly reports its finding (advertiser heterogeneity, multihoming, and media bias) but does not build its model, assumptions, or derivations on that specific study. The core contribution is positioned around content acquisition and upstream content creation, with no clear methodological or conceptual dependence on this cited work beyond background positioning.
